# Support

> This project has a [code of conduct](CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md).
> By interacting with this repository, organization, or community you agree to abide by its terms.

Hi! 👋

We're excited that you're using **Sereni Base** and we'd love to help.
To help us help you, please read through the following guidelines.

## Questions

Please chat and ask questions on [GitHub Discussions](https://github.com/aptlogica/sereni-base/discussions).
Jump in there and lurk, talk to us, and help others.

## Bug Reports

see [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md).

## Feature Requests

Please chat and ask questions on [GitHub Discussions](https://github.com/aptlogica/sereni-base/discussions).
Jump in there and lurk, talk to us, and help others.

## Community

Stay up to date on the development of Sereni and reach out to the community:

- Follow [@aptlogica on Twitter](https://twitter.com/aptlogica)
- Join our [Discord server](https://discord.gg/aptlogica)
- Check out the [documentation](https://github.com/aptlogica/sereni-base/wiki)

## Professional Support

If you need professional support for your project, please contact us at support@aptlogica.com.

We offer:
- Priority support
- Custom integrations
- Training and consulting
- Enterprise features

## Contributing

See [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md) for ways to get started.
Please adhere to this project's [code of conduct](CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md).
